description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the fedora Docker image. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that only runs on the master branch. The job should install cmake, doxygen, graphviz, mscgen, make, and gcc-c++ via dnf, create a build directory, run cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=doc .., execute make doc, and move the generated doc/html directory to a public/ folder. Publish the public/ directory as a Pages artifact.
